case_title: JOHNNY SWEIDAN VS. KEN ROTTER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWEIDAN, JOHNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: THE FRONT GARAGE LOCATED AT 871 CAPP ST. S.F. CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWEIDAN, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWEIDAN, JOHNNY SERVED JUL-24-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN
DECLARATION OF LEO M LAROCCA IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR REAL PROPERTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWEIDAN, JOHNNY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROTTER, KEN
